parsed.production_notes: The video is a 2D vector animation featuring brand mascots and app interface mockups. It is classified as human-recorded (traditional motion graphics) as there are no AI-generated artifacts, uncanny features, or unnatural movements typical of AI generation.

characters.appearance: A stylized, bright green cartoon owl with a rounded body, large eyes, a yellow beak, and small yellow feet.
characters.wardrobe: No clothing, except when depicted in specific app illustrations (e.g., graduation gown).

characters.appearance: A cartoon woman with dark skin and black hair styled in a high bun.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a yellow headband, a blue short-sleeved shirt, blue pants, and red shoes.

characters.appearance: A cartoon man with light skin and blonde hair.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a red headband, a red long-sleeved athletic top, and red shorts.

panels.panel_visual_description: A bright green cartoon owl stands in the center of a solid white background. The owl has a rounded body, large eyes, a yellow beak, and small yellow feet. Initially, the owl holds a small, stylized globe in its wings. The globe features blue oceans and green landmasses. The object in the owl's wings then transforms into a magnifying glass with a green and yellow handle. The owl maintains a cheerful and inviting expression throughout the sequence.

scenes.visual_description: The scene features the Duolingo owl mascot centered on a white background. Green text above the owl asks 'want to improve your english?'. The owl initially holds a globe, which then turns into a magnifying glass. Below the owl is a white button indicating 'Intermediate English' alongside a US flag icon. A grey cursor appears from the bottom of the screen. The cursor moves up and clicks the button, initiating a transition to the next scene.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Want to improve your English? [Want to improve your English?]
scenes.on_screen_text:
want to improve your english?
Intermediate English

panels.panel_visual_description: The scene consists of a solid light blue background. In the center, a small illustration depicts a green cartoon owl. The owl is dressed in a black academic graduation gown and a matching black mortarboard cap with a yellow tassel. The owl holds a rolled-up white diploma secured with a yellow ribbon. The owl has a happy expression with its eyes closed in a smile. The overall composition is simple and flat.

scenes.visual_description: An app interface mockup is displayed against a solid blue background. The white text 'learn b2 english' and 'with duolingo' appears at the top of the screen. The app screen itself shows a fill-in-the-blank exercise featuring an illustration of the owl in graduation attire. The sentence reads 'Way to go, Duo! Learning another language is ___ an accomplishment!'. A cursor selects the word 'quite' from the options below. The cursor then clicks the green 'CHECK' button. A green banner appears at the bottom with the message 'Great job!'.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Learn B2 English with Duolingo. [Learn B2 English with Duolingo.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
learn b2 english
with duolingo
Complete the sentence
Way to go, Duo! Learning another language is quite an accomplishment!
quite
almost
hardly
not
CHECK
Great job!
CONTINUE

panels.panel_visual_description: A cartoon woman with dark skin and a yellow headband is running energetically towards the right side of the frame. She wears a blue short-sleeved shirt, blue pants, and red shoes. A green cartoon owl is flying alongside her, keeping pace. They are set against a solid purple background. A yellow starburst effect briefly appears behind them as they move. Both characters have determined, active expressions.

scenes.visual_description: The animated woman and the owl mascot are shown running across a solid purple background. The woman is in the foreground, while the owl flies slightly behind her. A yellow starburst graphic emphasizes their movement. White text at the bottom of the screen reads 'useful phrases for real life'. The characters maintain a continuous running animation throughout the short scene. The camera tracks their movement, keeping them centered in the frame.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Our new lessons teach you useful phrases for real life. [Our new lessons teach you useful phrases for real life.]

panels.panel_visual_description: The scene features a solid orange background. In the center, a small illustration depicts a cartoon woman. She has light skin, blonde hair, and is wearing a red dress. She also wears a gold crown on her head. Her expression is neutral, and she is facing forward. The illustration is flat and stylized, typical of vector graphics.

scenes.visual_description: An app interface mockup is shown centered on a solid orange background. The exercise prompt at the top asks the user to 'Type the missing word'. An audio icon is clicked by a cursor, and a voice speaks the target sentence. A digital keyboard slides up from the bottom of the app screen. The word 'Turn' is typed into the blank space in the sentence. The green 'CHECK' button is pressed by the cursor. A green banner appears at the bottom showing a 'Correct!' message, accompanied by animated confetti.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Turn the radio up so that Grandpa can hear it! [Turn the radio up so that Grandpa can hear it!]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Type the missing word
Turn the radio up so that Grandpa can hear it!
CHECK
Correct!

panels.panel_visual_description: A cartoon man with blonde hair and a red tracksuit stands on a solid white background. He is wearing a red headband and red shorts, and he is flexing his left bicep with a confident, proud expression. Next to him, a green cartoon owl stands looking up at him admiringly. Small colorful starbursts appear in the background around the characters. The lighting is flat and even, characteristic of 2D animation.

scenes.visual_description: The animated man is depicted flexing his bicep on a solid white background. The owl mascot stands beside him, looking up with an admiring expression. Small, colorful animated starbursts pop around the characters to emphasize the action. Green text above them reads 'reach your career goals'. The characters remain in a relatively static pose after the initial flexing animation. The composition is centrally focused with ample white space around the subjects.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: So you can reach your career goals. [So you can reach your career goals.]

panels.panel_visual_description: The scene consists of a solid yellow background. In the center, a small illustration shows a dark grey smartphone. The smartphone has a blank, dark screen. Several small, colorful square sticky notes in shades of pink, yellow, and green are attached to the edges and screen of the phone. The illustration is simple, flat, and uses bold colors.

scenes.visual_description: An app interface mockup is displayed against a solid yellow background. The green text 'it's free', 'it's fun', and 'it's effective' appears sequentially at the top of the screen. The app screen shows a fill-in-the-blank exercise with an illustration of a smartphone covered in sticky notes. The sentence involves working in the tech industry and building laptops or phones. A cursor selects the word 'build' from the available options. The cursor then clicks the green 'CONTINUE' button. A green banner appears at the bottom with the message 'Great!' and animated confetti.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: It's free, fun, and effective. [It's free, fun, and effective.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
it's free
it's fun
it's effective
Complete the sentence
It would be interesting to work in the tech industry and build laptops or phones!
steal
drink
eat
build
CONTINUE
Great!

panels.panel_visual_description: The scene consists entirely of a solid white background. There are no characters, props, or environmental details visible in the underlying imagery. The lighting is completely flat and uniform across the entire frame. The composition is entirely empty, serving as a blank canvas.

scenes.visual_description: The scene transitions to a white end card. The Duolingo logo, featuring the green owl face, and the brand name appear in the center of the screen. Below the logo, grey text reads 'Download the world's #1 language learning app.'. Standard App Store and Google Play download badges are displayed at the bottom. The layout is clean and symmetrical. There is no movement or animation in this final shot.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Download Duolingo, the number one language learning app. [Download Duolingo, the number one language learning app.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
duolingo
Download the world's #1 language learning app.
Download on the App Store
GET IT ON Google Play
